title: mentha × suavis var. avellinii
intro: Mentha × suavis var. avellinii, commonly known as Corsican mint, is a natural hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × suavis var. avellinii include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
